description: Bonifacio Caput, a factory maintenance worker, sustained a chemical splash injury to the left hand and forearm from a caustic cleaning agent during routine equipment maintenance. As the occupational health physician, complete the workplace injury protocol in GNU Health for this patient. Document the chemical burn diagnosis, record the clinical evaluation, prescribe wound care treatment, order toxicology and baseline laboratories, and schedule a wound reassessment follow-up. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
